title: Spice Spoons Kids Cooking
shortDesc: Supervised kids Thai cooking class at Anantara Bophut — ages 5–12 make pizza, burgers and Thai snacks with chef instructors.
description: Spice Spoons at Anantara Bophut is Koh Samui's most recognised cooking school. The dedicated kids class (ages 5–12) features a fun menu of pizza and burger making alongside Thai snacks, all supervised by professional chef instructors. The experience includes a tour of the herb garden. Adults can join the full Thai cooking class simultaneously (ages 12+). A genuine drop-off experience with structured, chef-led supervision.
priceNote: Kids class pricing on request. Adult class 2,400 THB++.
